entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The primary crop analyzed for production efficiency and environmental impact

entities.name: ALTERNATIVE TILLAGE
entities.description: Tillage practices designed to reduce water and labor requirements

entities.name: CROP ESTABLISHMENT
entities.description: The process of establishing a crop in the field, including transplanting and direct-seeding

entities.name: PUDDLED-TRANSPLANTED RICE CULTIVATION
entities.description: Traditional rice cultivation involving soil puddling and transplanting of seedlings

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity measured as the amount of crop produced

entities.name: WATER INPUT
entities.description: The volume of water used during the crop production process

entities.name: LABOR
entities.description: The amount of human work required for crop cultivation

entities.name: GREENHOUSE GAS EMISSIONS
entities.description: The release of gases that contribute to the greenhouse effect, specifically methane and nitrous oxide

entities.name: COST
entities.description: The financial expenditure associated with crop production

entities.name: NET RETURN
entities.description: The economic profit after subtracting costs from total revenue

entities.name: GLOBAL META AND MIXED MODEL ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical analysis method used to evaluate data from multiple studies

entities.name: TRANSPLANTING
entities.description: The method of moving seedlings from a nursery to the main field

entities.name: DIRECT-SEEDING
entities.description: The method of sowing seeds directly into the field

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL TILLAGE
entities.description: Standard tillage practices used in agriculture

entities.name: ZERO TILLAGE
entities.description: A tillage method where the soil is left undisturbed

entities.name: REDUCED TILLAGE
entities.description: A tillage method that minimizes soil disturbance compared to conventional tillage

entities.name: WET TILLAGE
entities.description: Tillage performed under wet soil conditions

entities.name: METHANE EMISSIONS
entities.description: The emission of methane gas from rice fields

entities.name: NITROUS OXIDE EMISSIONS
entities.description: The emission of nitrous oxide gas from rice fields

entities.name: SOIL TEXTURE
entities.description: The physical composition of the soil which affects yield advantages

entities.name: AGRO-ECOSYSTEM
entities.description: The specific agricultural environment to which practices should be refined
